positioning: doctor-formulated Ayurvedic obesity and weight-loss system
structured guided protocol, not a loose supplement
not a standalone fat-burner claim product
promise_claims: 3 to 5 kg weight loss in 15 days when protocol is followed
eligibility: users with cravings, inconsistency, emotional eating, low energy, or slow progress
relevant for PCOD/PCOS, thyroid imbalance, high BP, fatty liver, diabetes, IBS as obesity-support context (not a cure claim)
caution_conditions: multiple psychiatric medications require doctor review
multiple surgery history requires doctor review
protocol_morning: OK Liquid on empty stomach in the morning
protocol_night: OK Tablet plus 1/2 tsp OK Powder around 15 minutes before sleep
fasting_rules: eat only when true hunger is felt
allowed_items: millets or oats up to 30g if still hungry
restricted_items: dairy except milk in tea or coffee
mechanism_allowed_claims: helps improve adherence to a caloric deficit
supports practical obesity and weight-loss efforts
safety_internal_handling: first 3 days can be adjustment period
guarantee: if weight-loss start is not observed in first 7 days, refund applies
conditions: follow protocol and share daily tracker
continuation: continue until target weight or BMI 25
after each 30 days take a 7 to 10 day break
maintenance: stopping kit does not itself cause automatic regain
on_image_copy_requirements: Every headline and subheadline must explicitly mention weight loss, obesity reduction, or a direct weight outcome.
Avoid abstract transformational lines that do not name the product goal.
Approved explicit framing includes: weight-loss support, obesity management support, lose weight, reduce excess weight, 3 to 5 kg in 15 days, appetite control for weight loss.
